name: sellsight-api-testing
description: API testing toolchain for SellSight (Portman + Newman)

scripts.generate-collection: npx portman --url http://localhost:8080/v3/api-docs --output scripts/sellsight-collection.json --portmanConfigFile portman.config.json --envFile scripts/portman-env.json
scripts.test:api: npx newman run scripts/sellsight-collection.json --environment scripts/portman-env.json --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export scripts/newman-results.json
scripts.api-pipeline: node scripts/wait-for-api.js && npm run generate-collection && npm run test:api
